steps.title: Identify the past time signal
steps.content: The phrase “In 1613” marks a specific, completed moment in history.

steps.title: Match the verb tense
steps.content: Use simple past tense for an action at a definite point in the past. “Malfunctioned” is simple past and matches “In 1613.” Choices A (present), B (future), and C (present perfect) don't fit this rule. This matches choice D — D is correct.
